transcript: Piss on you! Piss on you, and all your goddamn crap! You know what I mean? My area code is 882... my... telephone number. Just go to hell, will ya? I'm calling in, ah... this call waiting thing. I'll wait for your representative to come. I'm 'onna kick his ass in the butt.
This is Longmont Potion Castle II, a compilation from D.U. Records. Number one request of Andre the Giant. Thanks for listening.
